title: FAIR Data Schema Entity Roles CV
description: A simple controlled vocabulary for roles played by entities in the FAIR Data Schema. For more complex use cases, use the DDI ContributorRole CV.

Provider.description: The entity providing the technical infrastructure, platform, or hosting to access the resource.

Producer.description: The entity primarily responsible for making or producing the resource.

Contributor.description: An entity responsible for making contributions to the resource.

Curator.description: The entity responsible for active data management, metadata enhancement, and quality assurance during the data creation and ingest process.

Distributor.description: The entity responsible for the dissemination and administrative availability of the resource to users.

Archive.description: The entity responsible for bit-level preservation, persistent integrity, and long-term accessibility of the digital resource.
